docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, GONZALO AS TO DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MR. PIZZA MAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, GONZALO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, GONZALO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MR. PIZZA MAN $31,294.76 PRINCIPAL, $510.32 INTEREST, $224.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $32,029.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
